R Notebook

library(tidyverse)
library(marginaleffects)
library(fixest)
library(gam)
library(splines)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(useful)
library(purrr)
library(patchwork)
library(rms)
library(tidycensus)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(did)
library(haven)
library(bea.R)
library(lpdid)
library(DIDmultiplegtDYN)
library(ggpattern)
library(countrycode)
library(stringr)
library(ggpattern)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpubr)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

source("emileRegs.R")

Data Barrage

myblue  = "#1f78b4"   # blue
myred  = "#e31a1c"
myyellow = "orange"  # orange
myblack = "black"  # light blue
mygreen = "forestgreen"  # green
pwt <- read_stata("raw data/pwt_clean.dta")
tcs <- read_stata("raw data/ibtracs_clean.dta")
wdi <- read_stata("raw data/wdi_clean_2018.dta")
data <- pwt %>% left_join(tcs, by = c("year", "countrycode")) %>%
  left_join(wdi, by = c("year", "countrycode"))
knot_to_ms = 0.514444
data$energy_sqkm <- data$sum_ann_energy_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$energy <- data$sum_ann_energy_i_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind_knots <- data$max_ann_wind_i_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind_sqkm_knots <- data$max_a_wind_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind <- data$max_ann_wind_i_nob %>% replace_na(0) * knot_to_ms
data$avgwind <- data$avg_ann_wind_i_nob %>% replace_na(0) * knot_to_ms
data$nlands <- data$sum_a_lands_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$nlands_sqkm <- data$sum_a_lands_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind_sqkm <- data$max_a_wind_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0) * knot_to_ms
data %>%  arrange(countrycode, year) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    hc_diff = hc - lag(hc),
    maxwind_sqkm_diff = maxwind_sqkm - lag(maxwind_sqkm),
    maxwind_diff = maxwind - lag(maxwind),
    nlands_diff = nlands - lag(nlands),
    l0_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 0),
    l0_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 0),
    l1_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 1),
    l1_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 1),
    l2_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 2),
    l2_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 2),
    l3_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 3),
    l3_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 3),
    l4_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 4),
    l4_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 4),
    l5_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 5),
    l5_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 5),
    l0_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 0),
    l0_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 0),
    l1_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 1),
    l1_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 1),
    l2_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 2),
    l2_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 2),
    l3_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 3),
    l3_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 3),
    l4_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 4),
    l4_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 4),
    l5_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 5),
    l5_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 5)
    
    ) %>% 
  ungroup() -> data


data$continent <- countrycode(data$countrycode,
                                 origin = "iso3c",
                                 destination = "continent")

data_tc <- data %>%
  mutate(
    treat = as.integer(maxwind > 0),
    treatstorm = as.integer(maxwind >= 34),
    treathurricane = as.integer(maxwind >= 64),
    #create category factors for hurricances
    category = ifelse(maxwind < 18, "No Storm",
                      ifelse(maxwind >= 18 & maxwind < 33, "Tropical Storm",
                             ifelse(maxwind >= 33 & maxwind < 43, "Category 1",
                                    ifelse(maxwind >= 43 & maxwind < 50, "Category 2",
                                           ifelse(maxwind >= 50 & maxwind < 58, "Category 3",
                                                  ifelse(maxwind >= 58 & maxwind < 70, "Category 4",
                                                         "Category 5")))))),
    categorybin = ifelse(maxwind >= 49, "Category 3-5",
                           ifelse(maxwind >= 33 & maxwind < 49, "Category 1-2",
                                  ifelse(maxwind >= 18 & maxwind < 33, "Tropical Storm",
                                         "No Storm"))),
    
    loggdp = ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    gdp = real_gdp_usd_pc,
    gdp_diff = growth_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    year2 = year^2,
    year3 = year^3,
    maxwind1 = maxwind,
    maxwind2 = maxwind^2,
    maxwind3 = maxwind^3,
    maxwind_diff1 = maxwind_diff,
    maxwind_diff2 = maxwind_diff^2,
    maxwind_diff3 = maxwind_diff^3,
    nland_diff1 = nlands_diff,
    nland_diff2 = nlands_diff^2,
    nland_diff3 = nlands_diff^3,

    period = ifelse(year <= 1990, "Pre-1990", "Post-1990"),
    period90 = case_when(year <=1990 ~'Pre',
                        year >1990 ~'Post'),
     period91 = case_when(year <=1991 ~'Pre',
                        year >1991 ~'Post'),
    period89 = case_when(year <=1989 ~'Pre',
                        year >1989 ~'Post'),
    period92 = case_when(year <=1992 ~'Pre',
                        year >1992 ~'Post'),
    period88 = case_when(year <=1988 ~'Pre',
                        year >1988 ~'Post'),
    decade = case_when(
      year >= 1970 & year < 1980 ~ "1970s",
      year >= 1980 & year < 1990 ~ "1980s",
      year >= 1990 & year < 2000 ~ "1990s",
      year >= 2000 & year < 2010 ~ "2000s",
      year >= 2010 & year < 2020 ~ "2010s",
    ),
    period = case_when(
      year < 1997 ~ "1980-1996",
      year >= 1997 ~ "1997-2014"
    )
    
  ) %>% filter(year>=1980)

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  # compute country-level averages over 2000–2010
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    credit_avg = mean(domestic_credit[year >= 2000 & year <= 2014], na.rm = TRUE),
    gdp_pc_avg = mean(real_gdp_usd_pc[year >= 2000 & year <= 2014], na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # bin based on averages
  mutate(
    credit_bin = factor(
      ntile(credit_avg, 3),
      levels = 1:3,
      labels = c("q1", "q2", "q3")
    ),
    gdp_pc_bin = factor(
      ntile(gdp_pc_avg, 3),
      levels = 1:3,
      labels = c("bottom 1/3", "middle", "top 1/3")
    ),
    # create deciles for GDP per capita
    gdp_pc_decile = ntile(gdp_pc_avg, 5),
    gdp_pc_group = case_when(
      gdp_pc_decile == 1 ~ "bottom 1/5",
      gdp_pc_decile == 5 ~ "top 1/5",
      TRUE ~ "middle"
    )
  )

######### SHOCKs

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  #group_by(countrycode) %>%
  
  # Compute country-specific 95th percentiles over 1970-1990
  mutate(
    maxwind_p95 = quantile(maxwind[year >= 1980 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_p95  = quantile(nlands[year >= 1980 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_p95  = quantile(energy[year >= 1980 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    maxwind_sqkm_p95 = quantile(maxwind_sqkm[year >= 1980 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_sqkm_p95  = quantile(nlands_sqkm[year >= 1980 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_sqkm_p95  = quantile(energy_sqkm[year >= 1980 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_p90 = quantile(maxwind[year >= 1980 & year <= 2014], 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  # Build indicators, but only assign 1 if percentile > 0
  mutate(
    maxwind_95      = as.integer(maxwind_p95 > 0 & maxwind      >= maxwind_p95),
    nlands_95       = as.integer(nlands_p95  > 0 & nlands       >= nlands_p95),
    energy_95       = as.integer(energy_p95  > 0 & energy       >= energy_p95),
    maxwind_sqkm_95 = as.integer(maxwind_sqkm_p95 > 0 & maxwind_sqkm >= maxwind_sqkm_p95),
    nlands_sqkm_95  = as.integer(nlands_sqkm_p95  > 0 & nlands_sqkm  >= nlands_sqkm_p95),
    energy_sqkm_95  = as.integer(energy_sqkm_p95  > 0 & energy_sqkm  >= energy_sqkm_p95),
    maxwind_90      = as.integer(maxwind_p90 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p90),
    # Physical thresholds
    wind_10ms = as.integer(maxwind >= 10),
    wind_21ms = as.integer(maxwind >= 21)
  )



make_shock <- function(
  data,
  var,
  p = 0.95,
  baseline_start = 1980,
  baseline_end   = 2014,
  controls = NULL,
  threshold_level = c("global", "country"),
  scale_var = FALSE
) {
  

  threshold_level <- match.arg(threshold_level)

  if (!is.null(controls)) {
    rhs <- paste(controls)
  } else {
    rhs <- "1"
  }

  # -----------------------------
  # Build suffix consistently
  # -----------------------------
  suffix_parts <- c()

  if (!is.null(controls)) {
    suffix_parts <- c(suffix_parts, controls)
  }

  if (threshold_level == "country") {
    suffix_parts <- c(suffix_parts, "country")
  }

  if (scale_var) {
    suffix_parts <- c(suffix_parts, "varweight")
  }

  suffix <- if (length(suffix_parts) > 0) {
    paste0("_", paste(suffix_parts, collapse = "_"))
  } else {
    ""
  }

  # -----------------------------
  # FE model
  # -----------------------------
  formula_fe <- as.formula(
    paste(var, "~", rhs, "| countrycode[year] + year")
  )

  fe_model <- feols(formula_fe, data = data)

  # -----------------------------
  # Variable names
  # -----------------------------
  shock_name         <- paste0(var, "_shock", suffix)
  treat_name         <- paste0(var, "_treat", suffix)
  treat_forever_name <- paste0(var, "_treat_forever", suffix)
  first_treat_name   <- paste0(var, "_first_treat_year", suffix)
  thresh_name        <- paste0(var, "_shock_p", suffix)

  # -----------------------------
  # Residualized shock
  # -----------------------------
  data[[shock_name]] <- resid(fe_model)

  # -----------------------------
  # Optional variance scaling
  # -----------------------------
  if (scale_var) {

    data <- data %>%
      group_by(countrycode) %>%
      mutate(
        !!shock_name :=
          .data[[shock_name]] /
          sd(.data[[shock_name]], na.rm = TRUE)
      ) %>%
      ungroup()
  }

  # -----------------------------
  # Threshold construction
  # -----------------------------
  if (threshold_level == "global") {

    global_thresh <- quantile(
      data[[shock_name]][
        data$year >= baseline_start & data$year <= baseline_end
      ],
      p,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )

    data[[thresh_name]] <- global_thresh

  } else {

    data <- data %>%
      group_by(countrycode) %>%
      mutate(
        !!thresh_name := quantile(
          .data[[shock_name]][
            year >= baseline_start & year <= baseline_end
          ],
          p,
          na.rm = TRUE
        )
      ) %>%
      ungroup()
  }

  # -----------------------------
  # Treatment construction
  # -----------------------------
  data <- data %>%
    group_by(countrycode) %>%
    mutate(

      !!treat_name := as.integer(
        .data[[shock_name]] >= .data[[thresh_name]]
      ),

      !!treat_name := ifelse(.data[[var]] > 0, .data[[treat_name]], 0),

      !!first_treat_name := if_else(
        any(.data[[treat_name]] == 1),
        min(year[.data[[treat_name]] == 1]),
        NA_real_
      ),

      !!treat_forever_name := as.integer(
        !is.na(.data[[first_treat_name]]) &
          year >= .data[[first_treat_name]]
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  return(data)
}




data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  make_shock("maxwind") %>%
  make_shock("maxwind", scale_var = TRUE) %>%
  make_shock("maxwind", threshold_level = "country") %>%
  make_shock("maxwind_sqkm") %>%
  make_shock("maxwind_sqkm", scale_var = TRUE) %>%
  make_shock("maxwind_sqkm", threshold_level = "country") %>%
  make_shock("energy") %>%
  make_shock("energy_sqkm") %>%
  make_shock("nlands") %>%
  make_shock("nlands_sqkm") 




# add tfp
alpha <- 0.33
data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  mutate(
    ln_hc          = log(hc),
    ln_rkna        = log(rkna),
    ln_pop         = log(pop),
    ln_real_gdp_usd = log(real_gdp_usd),
    ln_tfp  = ln_real_gdp_usd - (alpha * ln_rkna) - (1 - alpha) * (ln_hc + ln_pop)
  )

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind_treat_past3 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-3):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past5 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-5):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past2 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-2):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past7 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-7):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past10 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-10):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past15 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-15):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past20 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-20):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer()
    
  ) %>%
  ungroup()


data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  arrange(countrycode, year) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    prev_treat_year = ifelse(maxwind_treat == 1, year, NA_integer_),
    prev_treat_year = zoo::na.locf(prev_treat_year, na.rm = FALSE),
    prev_treat_year = lag(prev_treat_year),   # force "previous", not current
    time_to_last = ifelse(
      maxwind_treat == 1 & !is.na(prev_treat_year),
      year - prev_treat_year,
      0L),
    ttl_bin = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 3 ~ "1-3",
      time_to_last > 3 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "3-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 7 ~ "5-7",
      time_to_last > 7 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "7-10",
      time_to_last > 10 & time_to_last <= 15 ~ "10-15",
       time_to_last > 15 & time_to_last <= 20 ~ "15-20",
      time_to_last > 20 ~ "20+"
    ),
      ttl_bin2 = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "1-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "5-10",
      time_to_last > 10 & time_to_last <= 15 ~ "10-15",
       time_to_last > 15 & time_to_last <= 20 ~ "15-20",
      time_to_last > 20 ~ "20+"
     ),
      ttl_bin3 = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "1-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "5-10",
      time_to_last > 10 ~ "10+"
     ),
    ttl_bin5 = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "1-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "5-10",
      time_to_last > 10 & time_to_last <= 15 ~ "10-15",
       time_to_last > 15 & time_to_last <= 20 ~ "15-20",
      time_to_last > 20 & time_to_last <= 25 ~ "20-25",
      time_to_last > 25 ~ "25+"
     )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ANALYSES

model_main <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ 
                i(period,maxwind1) + i(period,maxwind2)  | year + countrycode[year] , 
  data = data_tc, 
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)


max_x <- 40
min_x <- 0
rf_main <- useful::predict_poly_het(model_main,het.var = 'period',df=data_tc,
                           xvar = "maxwind", max= max_x, min= min_x, ref=0) 

ggplot(rf_main, aes(x = temp, y = response, color=period)) +
  geom_line(linewidth=1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper,fill=period), alpha = 0.2,color=NA) +
  #add 0 reference line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre-1990" = myblue, "Post-1990" = myred)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre-1990" = myblue, "Post-1990" = myred)) +
  labs(
    x = "Maximum Wind Speed (knots)",
    y = "Predicted GDP Growth Response",
  ) 

model_main <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ 
                l0_maxwind_p1 + l0_maxwind_p2 + l1_maxwind_p1 + l1_maxwind_p2  + l2_maxwind_p1 + l2_maxwind_p2 +
    l3_maxwind_p1 + l3_maxwind_p2 + l4_maxwind_p1 + l4_maxwind_p2 + l5_maxwind_p1 + l5_maxwind_p2
                       | countrycode[year] + year  + countrycode[year2]
                  , 
  data = data_tc, 
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)


max_avg_gst <- 40
min_avg_gst <- 0
rf_main <- useful::predict_poly_sum_lags(model_main,
                           xvar_name = "wind", var = "maxwind", max= max_avg_gst, min= min_avg_gst, ref=0)

ggplot(rf_main, aes(x = wind, y = response)) +
  geom_line(color='cornflowerblue',linewidth=1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2, fill = "dodgerblue") +
  #add 0 reference line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  theme_classic()

Cross section

#avg over time
data_cross <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_wind = mean(maxwind, na.rm=TRUE),
    avg_growth = mean(gdp_diff, na.rm=TRUE)
  )

model <- lm(
  avg_growth ~ poly(avg_wind, 2, raw=TRUE),
  data = data_cross
)
summary(model)

f <- useful::predict_poly(
  model,
  "avg_wind",
  min = min(data_cross$avg_wind, na.rm=TRUE),
  max = max(data_cross$avg_wind, na.rm=TRUE),
  ref = 0,
  xvar_name = "avg_wind",
  ci_level = 95
)

# Plot
ggplot(f, aes(x = avg_wind, y = response)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)

FE-DL

irfs_wind_cumulative <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "gdp_diff",
  main_var = "maxwind",
  lags = -5:20,
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
  shock_label = "Maximum Wind Speed Treatment"
)

# Plot
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(irfs_wind_cumulative, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci),
              fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect",
    title = "Cumulative Distributed Lag Effects"
  )

results_list <- list()

lag_specs <- list(
  "5 lags" = -5:5,
  "10 lags" = -5:10,
  "15 lags" = -5:15,
  "20 lags" = -5:20
)

for (spec_name in names(lag_specs)) {
  results_list[[spec_name]] <- cumulative_dl(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "gdp_diff",
    main_var = "maxwind_treat",
    lags = lag_specs[[spec_name]],
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
    shock_label = spec_name
  )
}

# Combine all results
all_results <- bind_rows(results_list, .id = "specification")

# Plot with different specifications
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, 
                        color = specification, fill = specification)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect on GDP growth",
    title = "Robustness to Lag Length Specification",
    color = "Specification",
    fill = "Specification"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")


results_continent <- cumulative_dl_interact(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "gdp_diff",
  main_var = "maxwind_treat",
  interact_var = "period3",
  lags = 0:10,
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
)

# Plot
ggplot(results_continent, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = " GDP growth"
  ) +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)

ggsave("figures/irf_DL_interact_period_post80.png", width = 5, height = 5)

outcome = "loggdp"
horizon = 10
fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year "
controls = "l(gdp_diff,2:5)"

irfs_wind_sqkm <- lp_panel(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = outcome,
  main_var = "maxwind_sqkm",
  controls = controls,
  horizon = horizon,
  fe = fe,
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>% 
  mutate(shock = "Maximum Wind Speed per sqkm")

irfs_land_sqkm <- lp_panel(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = outcome,
  main_var = "nlands_sqkm",
  controls = controls,
  horizon = horizon,
  fe = fe,
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>%
  mutate(shock = "Number of Landfalls per sqkm")

irfs_energy_sqkm <- lp_panel(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = outcome,
  controls = controls,
  main_var = "energy_sqkm",
  horizon = horizon,
  fe = fe,
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
) %>%
  mutate(shock = "Storm Energy per sqkm")

irfs_all <- bind_rows(
  irfs_wind_sqkm,
  irfs_land_sqkm,
  irfs_energy_sqkm
)


ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, fill = myred
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myred) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )



lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period3"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind",
    "maxwind_sqkm",
    "nlands",
    "nlands_sqkm",
    "energy",
    "energy_sqkm"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind exposure",
    "Wind exposure / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

NA
NA
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period3"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind",
    "maxwind_sqkm",
    "nlands",
    "nlands_sqkm",
    "energy",
    "energy_sqkm"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind exposure",
    "Wind exposure / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

Treatment Analysis


plot_shock_trends <- function(data, shock_var, break_year) {
  
  data %>%
    group_by( year) %>%
    summarise(
      avg_shock = sum(.data[[shock_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = year, y = avg_shock)) +
    
    # raw series
    geom_line(color = "black", size = 1, alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(color = "black", size = 2, alpha = 0.5) +
    
    # pre-break slope
    geom_smooth(
      data = function(d) d %>% filter(year < break_year),
      method = "lm",
      se = FALSE,
      color = "blue",
      size = 0.9
    ) +
    
    # post-break slope
    geom_smooth(
      data = function(d) d %>% filter(year >= break_year),
      method = "lm",
      se = FALSE,
      color = "red",
      size = 0.9
    ) +
    
    # break line
    geom_vline(
      xintercept = break_year,
      linetype = "dashed",
      size = 0.7
    ) +
    
    #facet_wrap(~ continent, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
    labs(
      x = "Year",
      y = paste("Average", shock_var)
    )
}

break_year <- 1970

plot_shock_trends(data_tc, "maxwind_95", break_year)

plot_shock_trends(data_tc, "maxwind_treat", break_year)


#correlation between shock variables
cor(data_tc$maxwind_shock, data_tc$energy_shock, use = "complete.obs")
[1] 0.4997623
cor(data_tc$maxwind_shock, data_tc$nlands_shock, use = "complete.obs")
[1] 0.4508204
cor(data_tc$energy_shock, data_tc$nlands_shock, use = "complete.obs")
[1] 0.4080699
cor(data_tc$maxwind_treat, data_tc$energy_treat, use = "complete.obs")
[1] 0.6523268
cor(data_tc$maxwind_treat, data_tc$nlands_treat, use = "complete.obs")
[1] 0.5643923
cor(data_tc$energy_treat, data_tc$nlands_treat, use = "complete.obs")
[1] 0.5271985
cor(data_tc$maxwind_treat, data_tc$maxwind_sqkm_treat, use = "complete.obs")
[1] 0.4499241
cor(data_tc$energy_treat, data_tc$energy_sqkm_treat, use = "complete.obs")
[1] 0.4696042
cor(data_tc$nlands_treat, data_tc$nlands_sqkm_treat, use = "complete.obs")
[1] 0.4015869
cor(data_tc$maxwind_shock, data_tc$maxwind, use = "complete.obs")
[1] 0.5313012

plot_event_series <- function(data, var, ylab) {
  
  df <- data %>%
    group_by(year) %>%
    summarise(
      avg = sum(.data[[var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # Fit linear trend
  fit <- lm(avg ~ year, data = df)
  slope <- coef(fit)[2]
  
  slope_label <- paste0(
    ifelse(slope >= 0, "+", ""),
    round(slope, 2),
    " events / year"
  )
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = year, y = avg)) +
    
    # main series
    geom_line(color = myblue, linewidth = 1.2) +
    
    # linear trend
    geom_smooth(
      method = "lm",
      se = FALSE,
      color = "indianred",
      linetype = "dashed",
      linewidth = 1.1
    ) +
    
    # slope annotation
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = min(df$year) + 0.05 * diff(range(df$year)),
      y = max(df$avg, na.rm = TRUE),
      label = slope_label,
      color = "indianred",
      hjust = 0,
      vjust = 1,
      size = 5,
      fontface = "bold"
    ) +
    
    labs(
      x = "",
      y = ylab
    ) +
    
    # integer y-axis
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6),
      labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 1)
    ) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
    theme(
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text  = element_text(color = "black")
    )
}

plot_event_series(
  data_tc,
  var  = "maxwind_95",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind events"
)

ggsave("figures/event_series_maxwind_95_post80.png", dpi = 300)
plot_event_series(
  data_tc,
  var  = "maxwind_treat",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind events (residualized)"
)

ggsave("figures/event_series_maxwind_treat_post80.png", dpi = 300)

plot_event_series(
  data_tc,
  var  = "maxwind_sqkm_treat",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind/sqkm events (res.)"
)


plot_event_series(
  data_tc,
  var  = "maxwind_sqkm_treat_country",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind/sqkm events (res.)"
)


plot_event_series(
  data_tc,
  var  = "maxwind_sqkm_treat_varweight",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind/sqkm events (res.)"
)

NA
NA
NA
data_plot <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_treat > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_treat > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# -----------------------------
# 2. RHS labels
# -----------------------------
label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2

# -----------------------------
# 3. Split countries into top/bottom halves
# -----------------------------
country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

# -----------------------------
# 4. Plot
# -----------------------------
ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )

ggsave("figures/event_timeline_post80.png", dpi = 300)

  filter(any(maxwind_treat_country > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%

  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()

  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# 4. Plot

  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column

    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  theme(

  )

data_tc_filtered <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(max(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE) > 0 | max(nlands, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) %>%
  ungroup()

map_data <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(
    data_tc_filtered %>%
      group_by(countrycode) %>%
      summarise(events = sum(maxwind_treat, na.rm = TRUE)),
    by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
  )

ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = events), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c (RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd")),
    limits = c(1, max(map_data$events, na.rm = TRUE)),
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 5),
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 1),
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "# events"
  ) +
  
  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
  #robinson 
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
   theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_events95p_post80.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)



# Example: fully independent control for each arrow/text
highlight_events <- tribble(
  ~countrycode, ~year, ~label, ~arrow_start_y, ~arrow_end_y, ~label_y, ~arrow_color, ~arrow_size, ~label_color, ~label_hjust,
  "USA", 2005, "USA 2005", 240, 20, 250, "dodgerblue", 1, "dodgerblue", -0.,
  "PHL", 2013, "PHL 2013", 250, 20, 280, "dodgerblue", 1, "dodgerblue", 0.5,
  "JPN", 1976, "JPN 1976", 200, 20, 230, "dodgerblue", 1, "dodgerblue", 0.6
) %>%
  left_join(data_tc %>% select(countrycode, year, maxwind_shock),
            by = c("countrycode", "year"))

# Plot
ggplot(data_tc, aes(x = maxwind_shock)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.1, fill = myblue, color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  labs(x = "Maximum Wind Speed Shock", y = "Frequency") +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text  = element_text(color = "black")
  ) +
  
  # Fully independent arrows
  geom_segment(data = highlight_events,
               aes(
                 x = maxwind_shock, xend = maxwind_shock,
                 y = arrow_start_y, yend = arrow_end_y,
                 color = arrow_color,
                 size = arrow_size
               ),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm"))
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +   # so the colors from the table are used directly
  scale_size_identity() +    # so sizes from the table are used directly

  # Fully independent labels
  geom_text(data = highlight_events,
            aes(
              x = maxwind_shock,
              y = label_y,
              label = label,
              color = label_color,
              hjust = label_hjust
            ),
            fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_color_identity()
ggsave("figures/histogram_shock_events.png", width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

#correlation between treatment and maxwind
ggplot(data_tc, aes(x = maxwind, y = maxwind_shock)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "Max Wind Speed", y = "Max Wind Speed Shock") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  #display r and p 
  annotate("text", x = 1, y = 40, label = paste0("r = ", round(cor(data_tc$maxwind, data_tc$maxwind_shock, use = "complete.obs"), 2)), hjust = 0, size=5) 

ggsave("figures/correlation_shock_maxwind_post80.png", width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)
countries_plot <- c("USA", "JPN", "PHL", "MOZ", "CAN", "AUS")

df_plot <- data_tc %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% countries_plot)

make_country_plot <- function(cty) {
  
  df_cty <- df_plot %>% filter(countrycode == cty)
  
  shock_max <- max(abs(df_cty$maxwind_shock), na.rm = TRUE)
  wind_max  <- max(df_cty$maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  scale_factor <- 1 * wind_max / shock_max
  
  ggplot(df_cty, aes(x = year)) +
    
    # Shock bars (left axis)
    geom_col(aes(y = maxwind_shock),
             fill = "firebrick",
             alpha = 0.6) +
    
    # Raw windspeed (right axis, rescaled)
    geom_line(aes(y = maxwind / scale_factor),
              color = "steelblue",
              linewidth = 1) +
    
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Shock",
      limits = c(-shock_max, shock_max),  # symmetric shock axis
      sec.axis = sec_axis(
        trans = ~ . * scale_factor,
        name = "Max Wind",
        breaks = seq(0, ceiling(wind_max), by = 20)
      )
    ) +
    
    labs(title = cty, x = NULL) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y.left  = element_text(color = "firebrick"),
      axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "steelblue")
    )
}

p <- lapply(countries_plot, make_country_plot)

wrap_plots(p, ncol = 2)

ggsave("figures/shock_wind_comparison_post80.png", dpi = 300)

countries_plot <- c("USA", "JPN", "PHL", "MOZ", "CAN", "AUS")

df_plot <- data_tc %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% countries_plot)

make_country_plot <- function(cty) {
  
  df_cty <- df_plot %>% filter(countrycode == cty)
  
  shock_max <- max(abs(df_cty$maxwind_sqkm_shock), na.rm = TRUE)
  wind_max  <- max(df_cty$maxwind_sqkm_shock, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  scale_factor <- 0.5 * wind_max / shock_max
  
  ggplot(df_cty, aes(x = year)) +
    
    # Shock bars (left axis)
    geom_col(aes(y = maxwind_sqkm_shock),
             fill = "firebrick",
             alpha = 0.6) +
    
    # Raw windspeed (right axis, rescaled)
    geom_line(aes(y = maxwind_sqkm / scale_factor),
              color = "steelblue",
              linewidth = 1) +
    
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Shock",
      limits = c(-shock_max, shock_max),  # symmetric shock axis
      sec.axis = sec_axis(
        trans = ~ . * scale_factor,
        name = "Max Wind",
        breaks = seq(0, ceiling(wind_max), by = 20)
      )
    ) +
    
    labs(title = cty, x = NULL) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y.left  = element_text(color = "firebrick"),
      axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "steelblue")
    )
}

p <- lapply(countries_plot, make_country_plot)

wrap_plots(p, ncol = 2)

#print year of max wind for each country
data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_year = year[which.max(maxwind_shock)],
    maxwind_sqkm_year = year[which.max(maxwind_sqkm_shock)],
    maxwind      = max(maxwind_shock, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_sqkm = 1000*max(maxwind_sqkm_shock, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(maxwind_sqkm))
top15 <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(avg_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_maxwind)) %>%
  slice(1:15)

data_plot <- data_tc %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% top15$countrycode) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_events    = sum(maxwind_treat == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_maxwind)) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(countrycode)))

p1 <- ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = n_events, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = n_events,
                   y = countrycode, yend = countrycode),
               color = "steelblue",
               linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Number of Events"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))


p2 <- ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = avg_maxwind, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = avg_maxwind,
                   y = countrycode, yend = countrycode),
               color = "firebrick",
               linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "firebrick") +
  labs(
    x = "m/s",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Max Wind (average 1980-2014)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

p2 + p1 + plot_layout(ncol = 2)

ggsave("figures/top15_countries_post80.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
treatments <- c("maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_varweight")
irfs <- list()
for (treat in treatments) {

  irf <- lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "maxwind",
    main_var = treat,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  )
  irfs[[treat]] <- irf %>%
    mutate(treatment = treat)
}

#Plot
irfs_all <- bind_rows(irfs)
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA, fill = "dodgerblue"
  ) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = "dodgerblue") +
  
  facet_wrap(~ treatment, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Max Wind"
  ) +
  #make x axis discrete  2x,4,6,8,10
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 10, by = 2)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) 


ggsave("figures/irf_maxwind_post80.png", dpi = 300)

CLEAN CONTROL


data_cleancontrol <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode, period) %>%
  summarise(
    any_treated = any(maxwind_treat == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(
    # keep if never treated anywhere
    all(!any_treated) |
    # OR treated in both periods
    all(any_treated)
  ) %>%
  pull(countrycode) %>%
  {\(keep) data_tc %>% filter(countrycode %in% keep)}()

data_cc_sqkm <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode, period) %>%
  summarise(
    any_treated = any(maxwind_sqkm_treat == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(
    # keep if never treated anywhere
    all(!any_treated) |
    # OR treated in both periods
    all(any_treated)
  ) %>%
  pull(countrycode) %>%
  {\(keep) data_tc %>% filter(countrycode %in% keep)}()

data_plot <- data_cleancontrol %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_treat > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_treat > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# -----------------------------
# 2. RHS labels
# -----------------------------
label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2

# -----------------------------
# 3. Split countries into top/bottom halves
# -----------------------------
country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

# -----------------------------
# 4. Plot
# -----------------------------
ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )



lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    controls = lp_controls,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_treat_country",
    "maxwind_treat_varweight"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Base",
    "Country threshold",
    "Var. weighted shock"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_cleancontrol
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 


ggsave("figures/irf_comparison_cleancontrol_post80.png", dpi = 300)

data_plot <- data_cc_sqkm %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_sqkm_treat > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_sqkm_treat > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))


label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2


country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )



lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    controls = lp_controls,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_sqkm_treat",
    "maxwind_sqkm_treat_country",
    "maxwind_sqkm_treat_varweight"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Base",
    "Country threshold",
    "Var. weighted shock"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_cc_sqkm
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

ggsave("figures/irf_comparison_cleancontrol_period_sqkm_post80.png", dpi = 300)


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]  +year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

lp_interacts <- c("maxwind_treat_past3",
                  "maxwind_treat_past5",
                  "maxwind_treat_past10",
                  "maxwind_treat_past15")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_cleancontrol,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(past_years = recode(past_years,
                             "maxwind_treat_past5"  = "Past 5 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past10"  = "Past 10 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past15"  = "Past 15 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past3" = "Past 3 yrs")) %>%
  mutate(past_years = factor(past_years, levels = c("Past 3 yrs", "Past 5 yrs", "Past 10 yrs", "Past 15 yrs")))


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Extreme event in past N years",
    fill = "Extreme event in past N years"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  facet_wrap(~past_years, ncol = 4) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/irf_by_past_events_post80.png", dpi = 300)
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    controls = lp_controls,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_treat_country",
    "maxwind_treat_varweight"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Base",
    "Country threshold",
    "Var. weighted shock"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_cleancontrol
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

MAIN IRF

shocks <- c("maxwind_95", "energy_95")

# Compute IRFs
irfs_all <- map_dfr(shocks, ~ 
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .x,
    horizon = 10,
    controls="l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
)

#get main irf 
irf_main <- irfs_all %>%
  filter(shock =="maxwind_95")

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = shock, fill = shock, linetype = shock)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("maxwind_95" = myblue, "energy_95" = myred),
                     labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("maxwind_95" = myblue, "energy_95" = myred),
                    labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("maxwind_95" = "solid", "energy_95" = "dotdash"),
                        labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


ggsave("figures/irf_maxwind_energy_post80.png", dpi = 300)
# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_95"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run LP
# ----------------------------
irf_df <- lp_panel_inter(
  data         = data_tc,
  outcome      = lp_outcome,
  main_var     = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon      = lp_horizon,
  fe           = lp_fe,
  panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
  controls     = lp_controls
)

# ----------------------------
# Top plot: IRFs
# ----------------------------
p_irf <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category, fill = category), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  #plot irf_main
  geom_line(data = irf_main, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, ), size = 0.9, color='black') +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, aes(color = category, fill = category)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# ----------------------------
# Bottom plot: maxwind_95 density by period
# ----------------------------
data_tc_hist <- data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 1990, "Before 1990", "After 1990")) %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    period = first(period)
  )

p_hist <- ggplot(
  data_tc_hist,
  aes(x = maxwind_treat, y = period, color = period)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    height = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.9,
    size = 1
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "# of extreme events per year",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  #add integer breaks to x axis
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))


# ----------------------------
# Combine top and bottom
# ----------------------------
p_irf / p_hist + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))


ggsave("figures/irf_maxwind_periods_post80.png", dpi = 300)

shocks <- c("maxwind_treat", "energy_treat")

# Compute IRFs
irfs_all <- map_dfr(shocks, ~ 
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .x,
    horizon = 10,
    controls="l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
)

#get main irf 
irf_main <- irfs_all %>%
  filter(shock =="maxwind_treat")

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = shock, fill = shock, linetype = shock)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("maxwind_treat" = myblue, "energy_treat" = myred),
                     labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("maxwind_treat" = myblue, "energy_treat" = myred),
                    labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("maxwind_treat" = "solid", "energy_treat" = "dotdash"),
                        labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_energy.png", dpi = 300)
# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run LP
# ----------------------------
irf_df <- lp_panel_inter(
  data         = data_tc,
  outcome      = lp_outcome,
  main_var     = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon      = lp_horizon,
  fe           = lp_fe,
  panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
  controls     = lp_controls,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov
)

# ----------------------------
# Top plot: IRFs
# ----------------------------
p_irf <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category, fill = category), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  #plot irf_main
  geom_line(data = irf_main, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, ), size = 0.9, color='black') +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, aes(color = category, fill = category)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# ----------------------------
# Bottom plot: maxwind_95 density by period
# ----------------------------
data_tc_hist <- data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 1990, "Before 1990", "After 1990")) %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    period = first(period)
  )

p_hist <- ggplot(
  data_tc_hist,
  aes(x = maxwind_treat, y = period, color = period)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    height = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.9,
    size = 1
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "# of extreme events per year",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  #add integer breaks to x axis
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))


# ----------------------------
# Combine top and bottom
# ----------------------------
p_irf / p_hist + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))
