Interact with Past treatment Dummy


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]  +year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

lp_interacts <- c("maxwind_treat_past3",
                  "maxwind_treat_past5",
                  "maxwind_treat_past10",
                  "maxwind_treat_past15")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(past_years = recode(past_years,
                             "maxwind_treat_past5"  = "Past 5 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past10"  = "Past 10 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past15"  = "Past 15 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past3" = "Past 3 yrs")) %>%
  mutate(past_years = factor(past_years, levels = c("Past 3 yrs", "Past 5 yrs", "Past 10 yrs", "Past 15 yrs")))


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Extreme event in past N years",
    fill = "Extreme event in past N years"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  facet_wrap(~past_years, ncol = 4) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_pastyears_post80.png", dpi = 300)
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat_varweight"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,2:3)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin2")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "No past shock",
        "1-5",
        "5-10",
        "10-15",
        "15-20",
        "20+"
      )
    )
  )

greta_colors <- c(
  "No past shock" = "#333333",  # dark red (recent / baseline)
  "1-5"          = "#F46D43",
  "5-10"         = "#FDAE61",
  "10-15"        = "#FEE08B",
  "15-20"        = "#A6D96A",
  "20+"          = "#2C7BB6"   # deep blue (old shocks)
)


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP growth",
    color = "Time since last event",
    fill = "Time since last event"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
   scale_color_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- NULL# "l(gdp_diff,2:5)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin3")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "No past shock",
        "1-5",
        "5-10",
        "10+"
      )
    )
  )
greta_colors <- setNames(
  brewer.pal(4, "Spectral")[c(4,3,2,1)],
  c("No past shock", "1-5", "5-10", "10+")
)


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  # geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.1, color = NA) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP growth",
    color = "Years since last event",
    fill = "Years since last event"
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2), fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
   scale_color_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_ttlbin3.png", dpi = 300)
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2:10)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "No past shock",
        "1-3",
        "3-5",
        "5-7",
        "7-10",
        "10-15",
        "15-20",
        "20+"
      )
    )
  )

greta_colors <- c(
  "No past shock" = "#333333",  # dark red
  "1-3"          = "#D73027",
  "3-5"          = "#F46D43",
  "5-7"          = "#FDAE61",
  "7-10"         = "#FEE08B",
  "10-15"        = "#A6D96A",
  "15-20"        = "#4DAF4A",
  "20+"          = "#2C7BB6"   # deep blue
)


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Time since last event",
    fill = "Time since last event"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
   scale_color_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2:10)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin3")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_recovery <- irf_df %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(irf_mean < 0), min(horizon[irf_mean < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(irf_mean < 0) & any(irf_mean >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf_mean < 0])),
      min(horizon[irf_mean >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf_mean < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,      # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~lp_horizon , # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
irf_recovery <- irf_recovery %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "1-5",
        "5-10",
        "10+",
        "No past shock"
      )
    )
  )


ggplot(irf_recovery, aes(x = category, y = recovery_time)) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    shape = 4,              # "x" marker
    color = "steelblue",
    stroke = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_line(
    group = 1,
    color = "steelblue",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 15)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Time since last event",
    y = "Estimated recovery time (years)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)
ggsave("figures/recovery_time_ttlbin3.png", dpi = 300)

Individual IRFS


m <- feols(
  loggdp ~1 | countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year,
  data = data_tc,
  vcov = DK ~ year,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

data_tc$loggdp_hat <- NA
ok <- !is.na(data_tc$loggdp)
data_tc$loggdp_hat[ok] <- resid(m)


irfs_list <- list()

country_tc <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_treat > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(countrycode) %>%
  unique()

for (i in country_tc) {
  for (h in 0:10) {
    
    m <- feols(
      f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ maxwind_treat + l(gdp_diff, 1:2) | countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] ,
      data = data_tc %>% filter(countrycode == i),
      vcov = DK ~ year,
      panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
    ) 
    
    irf <- broom::tidy(m) %>%
      filter(term == "maxwind_treat") %>%
      transmute(
        countrycode = i,
        horizon     = h,
        irf         = estimate,
        se          = std.error,
        irf_down    = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
        irf_up      = estimate + 1.96 * std.error
      )
    
    irfs_list[[length(irfs_list) + 1]] <- irf
  }
}

irfs_country <- bind_rows(irfs_list)

#Plit irfs for selected countries
to_plot <- c("USA", "JPN", "PHL", "MOZ", "MDG","DOM")
ggplot(filter(irfs_country, countrycode %in% to_plot), aes(x = horizon, y = irf)) +
  geom_line(color='firebrick1',linewidth=1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15, color = NA, fill='firebrick1') +
  facet_wrap(~ countrycode, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  #percentage y axis
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  # add 0 line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6)
ggsave('figures/irf_individual_countries.png', dpi = 300)

country_covars <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_maxwind      = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_treated         = sum(maxwind_treat == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_loggdp_pc     = mean(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

irfs_covars <- irfs_country %>%
  left_join(country_covars, by = "countrycode")

irfs_covars_min <- irfs_covars %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    min_irf = min(irf, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_irf = max(irf, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_maxwind = mean(mean_maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_treated = mean(n_treated, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_loggdp_pc = mean(avg_loggdp_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

#get recovery time from irf going back to 0 after going negative
recovery_time <- irfs_covars %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  summarise(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(irf < 0), min(horizon[irf < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(irf < 0) & any(irf >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf < 0])),
      min(horizon[irf >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,      # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ lp_horizon, # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop",
    mean_maxwind = mean(mean_maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_treated = mean(n_treated, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_loggdp_pc = mean(avg_loggdp_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

m1 <- feols(min_irf ~ mean_maxwind + n_treated + avg_loggdp_pc, data = irfs_covars_min)


m2 <- fepois(recovery_time ~ mean_maxwind + n_treated + avg_loggdp_pc, data = recovery_time)


etable(m1, m2, vcov = "HC1", fitstat = c("n", "cor2"), file = "tables/irf_covars.tex", replace = TRUE)
etable(m1,m2)
                               m1                 m2
Dependent Var.:           min_irf      recovery_time
                                                    
Constant        -0.1097. (0.0581)  3.117*** (0.4954)
mean_maxwind      0.0006 (0.0007)    0.0077 (0.0060)
n_treated         0.0036 (0.0027) -0.0730** (0.0243)
avg_loggdp_pc     0.0041 (0.0062) -0.1455** (0.0538)
_______________ _________________ __________________
Family                        OLS            Poisson
S.E. type                     IID                IID
Observations                   67                 67
Squared Cor.              0.11168            0.08016
Pseudo R2                -0.04050            0.03991
BIC                       -187.01             410.23
---
Signif. codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
horizons <- sort(unique(irfs_covars$horizon))

# run one regression per horizon
models <- lapply(horizons, function(h) {
  
  feols(
    irf ~ mean_maxwind + n_treated + avg_loggdp_pc,
    data = filter(irfs_covars, horizon == h),
    vcov = "hetero"   
  )
})

names(models) <- paste0("h=", horizons)

etable(models)
                             h=0              h=1              h=2               h=3              h=4               h=5
Dependent Var.:              irf              irf              irf               irf              irf               irf
                                                                                                                       
Constant        -0.0106 (0.0215) -0.0454 (0.0323) -0.0536 (0.0402)  -0.0195 (0.0520)  0.0050 (0.0606)  -0.0267 (0.0803)
mean_maxwind    2.48e-5 (0.0001)  0.0001 (0.0002)  0.0001 (0.0003)  9.62e-6 (0.0003) 8.78e-5 (0.0003) -1.39e-5 (0.0004)
n_treated       -0.0009 (0.0010)  0.0005 (0.0014)  0.0002 (0.0018) -7.38e-5 (0.0017) -0.0020 (0.0016)  -0.0003 (0.0022)
avg_loggdp_pc    0.0020 (0.0023)  0.0041 (0.0035)  0.0052 (0.0041)   0.0019 (0.0052)  0.0007 (0.0063)   0.0027 (0.0082)
_______________ ________________ ________________ ________________ _________________ ________________ _________________
S.E. type       Heterosked.-rob. Heterosked.-rob. Heterosked.-rob. Heteroskeda.-rob. Heterosked.-rob. Heteroskeda.-rob.
Observations                  67               66               66                66               65                65
R2                       0.02212          0.02407          0.02623           0.00249          0.01453           0.00287
Adj. R2                 -0.02445         -0.02315         -0.02089          -0.04578         -0.03393          -0.04616

                              h=6              h=7              h=8              h=9             h=10
Dependent Var.:               irf              irf              irf              irf              irf
                                                                                                     
Constant         -0.0375 (0.0620) -0.0543 (0.0648) -0.0896 (0.0572) -0.0346 (0.0489) -0.0431 (0.0434)
mean_maxwind    -9.29e-5 (0.0003) -0.0002 (0.0004) -0.0004 (0.0003) -0.0003 (0.0004) -0.0003 (0.0004)
n_treated        -0.0014 (0.0019) -0.0019 (0.0020)  0.0011 (0.0017) 0.0038* (0.0019) 0.0045* (0.0020)
avg_loggdp_pc     0.0048 (0.0063)  0.0076 (0.0070)  0.0094 (0.0069)  0.0015 (0.0060)  0.0019 (0.0055)
_______________ _________________ ________________ ________________ ________________ ________________
S.E. type       Heteroskeda.-rob. Heterosked.-rob. Heterosked.-rob. Heterosked.-rob. Heterosked.-rob.
Observations                   65               64               64               64               62
R2                        0.02653          0.04965          0.02935          0.02981          0.05728
Adj. R2                  -0.02135          0.00213         -0.01919         -0.01870          0.00852
---
Signif. codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
etable(models, fitstat = c("n", "ar2"), vcov = "HC1", file = "tables/irf_covars_by_horizon.tex", replace = TRUE)

irfs_long <- irfs_covars %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(mean_maxwind, n_treated, avg_loggdp_pc),
    names_to = "covariate",
    values_to = "value"
  )

covars <- unique(irfs_long$covariate)

plots <- lapply(covars, function(cov) {
  
  ggplot(filter(irfs_long, covariate == cov),
         aes(x = value, y = irf)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
    facet_wrap(~ horizon, scales = "free_x",ncol=4) +
    stat_cor(method = "pearson",
             label.x.npc = "left",
             label.y.npc = "top",
             size = 4) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
    labs(
      title = cov,
      x = NULL,
      y = "IRF"
    )
})

plots[[1]]

plots[[2]]

plots[[3]]


covars <- unique(irfs_long$covariate)

for (i in seq_along(plots)) {
  
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0("figures/irf_", covars[i], ".pdf"),
    plot = plots[[i]],
    width = 8,
    height = 6
  )
}
corr_df <- irfs_long %>%
  group_by(horizon, covariate) %>%
  summarise(
    corr = cor(value, irf, use = "complete.obs"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(corr_df,
       aes(x = horizon, y = corr, color = covariate)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "Pearson Correlation (IRF, Covariate)",
    color = "Covariate"
  )

Misc


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "decade"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    controls = lp_controls,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_sqkm_shock",
    "maxwind_sqkm_treat",
    "maxwind_shock",
    "nlands_sqkm_treat",
    "nlands_sqkm_shock",
    "nlands_treat",
    "nlands_shock"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind treatment",
    "Wind per sqkm shock",
    "Wind per sqkm treatment",
    "Wind shock",
    "Landfalls per sqkm treat",
    "Landfalls per sqkm shock",
    "Landfalls treatment",
    "Landfalls shock"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter(category!="2010s")

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 4, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 


# Define shocks and their labels
shocks <- list(
  maxwind_sqkm_shock = "Maximum Wind Speed per sqkm",
  nlands_sqkm_shock = "Number of Landfalls per sqkm",
  energy_sqkm_shock = "Storm Energy per sqkm"
)

# Run lp_panel for each shock
irfs_all <- imap_dfr(shocks, ~ {
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .y,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    controls = "l(gdp_diff,2)",
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
})

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, fill = myred) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myred) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 9
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


shock_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~var, ~label, ~dataset,
  "maxwind_treat",        "Wind treatment",           data_cleancontrol,
  "maxwind_sqkm_treat",   "Wind per sqkm treatment",  data_cc_sqkm,
  "maxwind_shock",        "Wind shock",               data_cleancontrol,
  "maxwind_sqkm_shock",   "Wind per sqkm shock",      data_cc_sqkm,
  "maxwind",              "Wind speed",               data_cleancontrol,
  "maxwind_sqkm",         "Wind speed per sqkm",      data_cc_sqkm
)


run_lp <- function(var, label, dataset) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = dataset,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls      = lp_controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = label)
}

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(shock_map, run_lp)


ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  # x-axis integer by 2
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, lp_horizon, by = 2)) +
  
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )


ggsave("figures/irf_all_shocks_post80.png", dpi = 300)

# Define shocks and their labels
shocks <- list(
  maxwind_treat = "Maximum Wind Speed",
  nlands_treat = "Number of Landfalls",
  energy_treat = "Storm Energy")

# Run lp_panel for each shock
irfs_all <- imap_dfr(shocks, ~ {
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    controls = "l(loggdp,2)",
    main_var = .y,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
})

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, fill = myblue) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myblue) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period3"
lp_controls <- "l(loggdp,2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    controls = lp_controls,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "nlands_95",
    "energy_95"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

Raw vs residualized

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls = lp_controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "maxwind_treat",
    "wind_21ms"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed (raw)",
    "1/20y Wind speed (residualized)",
    "> 21 m/s Wind speed"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

shocks <- c(
  "maxwind_95",
  "maxwind_treat",
  "maxwind_sqkm_95",
  "maxwind_sqkm_treat"
)

irfs_all <- shocks %>%
  map_dfr(~ 
    lp_panel(
      data = data_tc,
      outcome = "loggdp",
      main_var = .x,
      horizon = 10,
      controls = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
      fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(term = .x)
  )

df_plot <- irfs_all %>%
  mutate(
    panel = ifelse(grepl("sqkm", term), "Max wind per sqkm", "Max wind"),
    type  = ifelse(grepl("treat", term), "Residualized", "Raw")
  )

ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = type),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(color = type, linetype = type),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Raw" = myblue, "Residualized" = myred)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Raw" = myblue, "Residualized" = myred)) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Raw" = "solid", "Residualized" = "dotdash")) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top"
  )



lp_outcome  <- "tfp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

Continent


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "continent"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls      = "l(gdp_diff,2:3)",
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "nlands_95",
    "energy_95"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  #geom_ribbon(
  #  aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
  #  alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  #) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "continent"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    #controls     = lp_controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  # Zero line (softer)
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6, color = "grey40") +
  
  # Confidence band (optional, looks nice if you turn it back on)
  # geom_ribbon(
  #   aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
  #   alpha = 0.15,
  #   color = NA
  # ) +
  
  # Main IRF lines
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "Continent",
    fill  = "Continent"
  ) +
  
  # Percent axis with cleaner formatting
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  
  # Wrap legend into multiple rows
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),
    fill  = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_continent_post80.png", dpi = 300)
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "countrycode"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,2:3)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    controls      = lp_controls
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Wind speed (residualized)"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter( category %in% c("USA","JPN","MOZ","PHL"))

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  # geom_ribbon(
  #   aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
  #   alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  # ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "countrycode"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    controls      = lp_controls
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter( category %in% c("USA","JPN","DOM","PHL"))

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  # geom_ribbon(
  #   aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
  #   alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  # ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "Country",
    fill = "Country"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 


ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_country_post80.png", dpi = 300)

TFP

outcomes <- c("loggdp", "tfp")

irfs_all <- outcomes %>%
  map_dfr(~ 
    lp_panel(
      data = data_tc,
      outcome = .x,
      main_var = "maxwind_treat",
      #controls =paste0( "l(", .x, ",2)"),
      horizon = 12,
      fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(outcome = .x)
  )
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +

  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = outcome),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(color = outcome, linetype = outcome),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("loggdp" = myblue, "tfp" = myred),
    labels = c("GDP per capita", "TFP")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("loggdp" = myblue, "tfp" = myred),
    labels = c("GDP per capita", "TFP")
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("loggdp" = "solid", "tfp" = "dotdash"),
    labels = c("GDP per capita", "TFP")
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
shock_var   <- "maxwind_treat"

run_lp <- function(outcome_name) {
  lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = outcome_name,
    main_var     = shock_var,
    interact_var = lp_interact,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    #controls    =paste0("l(", outcome_name, ",2)")
  ) %>%
    mutate(outcome = outcome_name)
}


irfs_all <- c("loggdp", "tfp") %>% map_dfr(run_lp)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ outcome, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background  = element_blank(),
    strip.text        = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position   = "top"
  )

Is it shaped by rich/poor

world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
map_data <- left_join(world, data_tc, by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode"))
ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = credit_bin),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Blues",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "Domestic credit"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )


ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = gdp_pc_bin),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Reds",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "GDP PC",
    direction = -1
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = gdp_pc_group),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Reds",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "GDP PC",
    direction = -1
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_bin"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind",
    "maxwind_sqkm",
    "nlands",
    "nlands_sqkm",
    "energy",
    "energy_sqkm"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind exposure",
    "Wind exposure / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>=1990)
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "year + countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_bin"
controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc 
) 

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "GDP group",
    fill = "GDP group"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

lp_fe       <- "year + countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "credit_bin"
controls <- NULL


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}

  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",

    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),

)

  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +

    data          = data,
